01🌤️
ReactViteAPITailwind

Dynamic Weather Dashboard

Premium weather app with real-time OpenWeatherMap data, interactive maps, glassmorphism UI, and dynamic background themes that change with the weather.

Live Demo GitHub
02🏛️
HTMLCSSJavaScript

College Event Management System

Full frontend web app to manage and display college events. Features event listings, registration forms, and a responsive UI for students and faculty.

View Project GitHub
03🚀
AIConceptProductivity

Life OS — AI Productivity System

Conceptual AI-based personal OS unifying tasks, goals, habits, and learning in one intelligent dashboard. Designed for next-gen personal productivity.

View Concept GitHub
04 ⚙️ In Progress 🔮
Three.jsWebGLGSAP

Quantum Mirror — 3D WebGL Experience

Interactive 10,000-point GPGPU particle system that reads your webcam to create a live holographic face. DNA, neural, and grid morphing modes.

Launch 3D Lab GitHub
05🏫
ReactNode.jsFirebase

JISSP Complaint Portal

Institutional accountability tracking network. Students can submit complaints, track status, and receive real-time updates from administration.

AI Tools Suite (Google-Powered)

A growing collection of AI utilities built on Gemini — smart summarizers, code assistants, and learning accelerators. Currently in planning phase.
